nodes.label: Detect 6 high-reliability candlestick patterns on the last 3 candles.
ADX: 0-100. Above 25 = trending. Above 40 = strong trend.
Bullish divergence:  price makes lower low BUT rsi makes higher low  → reversal
Calculate VWAP for the current session (resets each day).     Also returns dista
Checks the last 3 daily candles to determine macro bias.     Returns: bullish /
